name: chart/pie-chart
description: Pie or donut chart with hover segments and optional legend.

meta.name: PieChart
meta.description: Pie or donut chart with hover segments and optional legend.

props.name: data
props.description: Array of { id, label, value, color? } datums. Optional per-datum `color` (any CSS color) overrides the positional palette for that slice.

props.name: size
props.description: Square shorthand: sets width === height. Explicit width/height win.

props.name: thickness
props.description: Ring width in px (donut only); defaults to 0.4 × radius.

props.name: innerRadius
props.description: Inner radius in px (donut only); takes precedence over thickness; clamped to [0, outerRadius).

props.name: centerValue
props.description: Center value text rendered in the donut hole (donut only).

props.name: centerLabel
props.description: Center label text rendered below the value (donut only).

props.name: centerSlot
props.description: Arbitrary content for the donut hole; takes precedence over centerValue/centerLabel.

props.name: emptyLabel
props.description: Visible placeholder text when data is empty. Defaults to the i18n "No data".

props.name: tooltipFormat
props.description: Custom tooltip formatter. Defaults to "value (pct%)" in the slice color.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names merged onto the root element.

props.name: plain
props.description: Marks only — no axes, grid lines, or legend. For micro/inline charts.

props.name: labels
props.type: boolean | { format?: (v: number) => string; position?: string }
props.description: Print each value as a label on the mark (collision-aware, decorative/aria-hidden).

props.name: onSelect
props.description: Fired when a point is clicked or activated (Enter/Space) — for drill-down.

typeDefs.name: PieChartDatum
typeDefs.description: One slice. Pass via the `data` prop.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Stable identity (used for legend toggle state).

fields.name: color
fields.description: Any CSS color overriding the positional palette (--cascivo-chart-N) for this slice.

fields.name: percent
fields.description: Share of the whole, 0–100. Used by the default "value (pct%)" formatter.

fields.name: color
fields.description: Resolved slice color (the default tooltip tints its text with this).

examples.title: Donut with center total and custom thickness
examples.code:
import { PieChart } from '@cascivo/charts'

<PieChart
  donut
  size={220}
  thickness={28}
  centerValue="142"
  centerLabel="Total tasks"
  data={[
    { id: 'done', label: 'Done', value: 92, color: 'var(--cascivo-color-success)' },
    { id: 'wip', label: 'In progress', value: 34, color: 'var(--cascivo-color-warning)' },
    { id: 'blocked', label: 'Blocked', value: 16, color: 'var(--cascivo-color-destructive)' },
  ]}
  title="Task status"
/>

examples.title: Percentage tooltip + empty state

whenToUse: Showing part-of-whole proportions with five or fewer slices
A single composition at one point in time
whenNotToUse: Comparing precise values or many categories — use BarChart
Showing change over time — use LineChart or AreaChart

related.name: BarChart
related.reason: Use when comparing more than five categories or precise values

related.name: Treemap
related.reason: Use for part-to-whole with many or hierarchical segments

intent.a11yRationale: Renders with role="img" and requires a title prop for screen reader labeling.
